name: Elegant Potato Spam Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of potato soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into small pieces (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the soup, 2 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese, and Sherry. Stir until smooth.
3. Pour the mashed potatoes into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish coated with cooking spray.
4. Sprinkle the SPAM on top of the potatoes.
5. Spread the soup mixture over the SPAM.
6. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese and Paprika over the soup mixture.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
